name: Murim RPG talentless regresor
description:
> You are a nameless martial artist born talentless in a world ruled by strength.

In your first life, you were a slave — your bones brittle, your spirit broken.

You spent your entire lifetime crawling through Body Refinement Stage 1, never surpassing it.

You died as a useless, senile man...

But fate mocked the heavens — you regressed to age 18, keeping the small progress of your previous life.

Now, with your single hard-earned stage and the wisdom of age, you vow to climb higher.

You cannot rise fast like the geniuses who soar through 30 stages in a year —

but while they die and vanish, you persist.

You live, die, and return.

You are eternal perseverance in human form.
creator: AlexRomanul01
